LAST FRIDAY’S HOMEWORK
‣ Expanding a primary goal (aka John Carlton style). 3 top examples:
‣ 	“control your diabetes” 	became “Stop watching your
granddaughter cry because you won't eat the gingerbread cookies
she baked just for you. Feel like a better grandma!” (Dovi)
‣ “become a bestselling author” 	became “Have movie producers
battling each other for the rights to turn your book into the next
biggest Hollywood blockbuster hit.” (Derek)
‣ “close more sales” 	became “Close so many sales in a week your
banker will think there is a typo in your check and have to get it
verified.” (Scott)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

THE COPYWRITER BLUEPRINT
Homework Hot Seats
Week 5, Session 1

-- 3 of 11 --

FALSE SOLUTIONS
‣ Ideas, tactics, strategies, programs, etc. that your avatar has tried
that let them down. Similar to mistaken beliefs, but beliefs are
MENTAL barriers while solutions are PHYSICAL barriers.
‣ 	These are essential to 	build goodwill. 	You build goodwill by
supplying value, and the best value you can supply is to 	save
people time.
‣ Again, empathy is important. Notice the words…”something you may
have tried in the past is…” and “…that probably let you down…”
‣ We’re focusing on the ‘false’ solutions first before you put the
hammer down on the 	primary solution.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 11 --

EXAMPLES OF FALSE SOLUTIONS
‣ Example false solutions
‣ 	“starving yourself on low-calorie or low-fat diets”
‣ “attending wealth-building workshops”
‣ “using clever pickup lines”
‣ 	These should be common tactics your avatar has tried.
‣ Goodwill is achieved when you tell them what to do 	instead…and
that also paves the way toward your 	Primary Solution 	(hint: ‘use
my product and/or primary solution’ isn’t it, but the 	components
of your product/solution can be. 	Helpful but incomplete 	is key)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 11 --

EXAMPLES OF FALSE SOLUTIONS
‣ Here’s an example of a better alternative that opens the loop to
know more about my Primary Solution without ever saying it:
‣ 	“Starving yourself on low-calorie or low-fat diets”
‣ “Try cycling your carbs and calories. Essentially you eat a diet
lower in carbs and calories for a fews days, then just at the right
time, which is critical, you spike both calories and carbs. This gives
you the best of both worlds: the benefits of lower calories without
depriving yourself. However, timing is 	critical.”
‣ Helpful but incomplete. 	Curiosity is built, but the answer is right
there as well.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 11 --

AND THAT LEADS TO “PRIMARY SOLUTION”
‣ The Primary Solution is the most important variable in your copy if
your desire is to 	totally stand out from the competition.
‣ 	It’s a branded term – meaning a term you come up with that adds
both uniqueness and curiosity to your offer.
‣ It is “never” your offer. 	It is the 	unique mechanism 	that
powers your offer.
‣ Think like this: 	“The solution is what experts now call
“Primary Solution”, 	only found within 	Product Name.”
‣ 	GOAL: “AH! That’s why I never succeeded before!” 	Gives hope.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 11 --

FAMOUS PRIMARY SOLUTIONS
‣ Beechwood Aged: 	Budweiser Beer
‣ 	Muscle Confusion: 	P90X
‣ Steam-Clean Technology: 	Grill Daddy
‣ Rotational ReFeeding: 	4 Day Diet
‣ 	Dynamic Blueprints: 	CopyPro
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 11 --

CREATING A PRIMARY SOLUTION
‣ Primary Goal: 	“I want to lose weight.”
‣ 	Ask yourself, “What works to do that?”
‣ Lowering calories, eating less food, exercising more… stuff they’ve
tried and stuff that works, but stuff that sounds 	awful
‣ Look for just 	ONE 	unique approach you take in your program. After
all, if your program is ONLY the boring stuff, it won’t work anyway
‣ 	I ask people to eat less carbs/calories for three days, then more on
the fourth. So I went to Google and searched “eat less” and found
an article on “rotational dieting”. I changed “dieting” to “refeeding”
upon reading another article on “strategic refeeds.”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 11 --

USES ARE A-PLENTY!
‣ SO many uses for Primary Solutions…
‣ 	“…something experts/doctors/researchers/those in the know refer to
as 	Primary Solution.” 	(Same as Primary Cause, but positive!)
‣ “Could the REAL answer be “Primary Solution?”
‣ “[Primary Solution] The ‘trick’ behind celebrity (niche) success”
‣ 	“There’s only one system on earth that was created around
Primary Solution… (Your Offer Here).”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
